business_impact.label: Compliance
business_impact.detail: Customer may not have full visibility into the provider’s operations, potentially leading to compliance issues

findings.title: Potential delay in service due to provider's discretion on audit rights
findings.description: Customer may not have full visibility into the provider’s operations, potentially leading to compliance issues
findings.snippet: mercially reasonable efforts to delete Customer Data following termination. No deletion deadline is stated. Use of data Provider may use de-identified service data for product development and model improvement. Liability cap Aggregate liability limited to fees paid in prior 12 months, including for confidentiality and data-security claims. 2. Additional Draft Terms ● Provider may suspend service f
